categories.description: 노력했는데 안 됐을 때, 기대가 무너졌을 때
예상 못한 상황에 놀라거나 어이없을 때

expressions.en_pattern: I was heartbroken that ___ even though I had tried so hard.
examples: I was heartbroken that I failed the exam even though I had studied for weeks.
I was heartbroken that the project got cancelled even though I had tried so hard.
variations: I was crushed when ___
It broke my heart that ___
I felt devastated when ___

expressions.en_pattern: I was let down by ___ after looking forward to it.
examples: I was let down by the movie after looking forward to it all week.
I was let down by her response after expecting her to be more supportive.
variations: I had high hopes, but ___
It didn't live up to my expectations because ___

expressions.en_pattern: It feels like all my effort went to waste.
examples: It feels like all my effort went to waste when the client rejected the proposal.
All those late nights felt pointless when the deadline got pushed back anyway.
variations: My hard work didn't pay off
It felt like I was running in place

expressions.en_pattern: The disappointment hit harder because I had been so invested in ___.
examples: The disappointment hit harder because I had been so invested in this opportunity for months.
The disappointment hit harder because I had been so invested in proving myself this time.
variations: The higher my hopes, the harder the fall
It stung more because ___

expressions.en_pattern: It hurt my feelings to see ___.
examples: It hurt my feelings to see him laughing with other friends without inviting me.
It hurt my feelings to see that she didn't even remember my birthday.
variations: I felt left out when ___
It stung to see ___
I couldn't help feeling hurt when ___

expressions.en_pattern: I had expected ___, so I felt let down when it didn't happen.
examples: I had expected him to call me back, so I felt let down when he didn't.
I had expected my team to notice my work, so I felt let down when no one mentioned it.
variations: I thought ___ would ___, but ___
I was hoping for ___, but instead ___

expressions.ko_pattern: 나만 신경 쓰는 것 같아 서운해
expressions.en_pattern: It feels like I'm the only one putting effort into this.
examples: It feels like I'm the only one putting effort into this friendship lately.
I'm starting to feel like I care more about us than he does.
variations: I feel like I'm trying alone
It's a one-sided effort

expressions.en_pattern: I didn't say anything, but deep down, I was quietly hurt by ___.
examples: I didn't say anything, but deep down, I was quietly hurt by how dismissive she was.
I didn't say anything, but deep down, I was quietly hurt that no one defended me in the meeting.
variations: I kept it to myself, but ___ really stung
Outwardly I was fine, but inside ___

expressions.en_pattern: I was caught off guard when I was told that ___.
examples: I was caught off guard when I was told that my presentation was scheduled for tomorrow, not next week.
I was caught off guard when my friend said she didn't want to hang out anymore.
variations: I didn't know how to react when ___
I was thrown off when ___
It threw me off when ___

expressions.en_pattern: I couldn't believe that ___.
examples: I couldn't believe that the cashier charged me twice for the same item.
I couldn't believe that he showed up an hour late without an apology.
variations: I was speechless when ___
It was unbelievable that ___

expressions.en_pattern: I wasn't prepared for ___, so I panicked a bit.
examples: I wasn't prepared for the surprise question in the interview, so I panicked a bit.
I wasn't prepared for the rain, so I got completely soaked on the way home.
variations: ___ took me by surprise
I froze when ___

expressions.en_pattern: I was at a loss for words when ___.
examples: I was at a loss for words when she suddenly asked me how I really felt about her.
I was at a loss for words when my boss asked me to lead the project on the spot.
variations: I didn't know what to say when ___
Words failed me when ___

expressions.en_pattern: I felt a real sense of accomplishment after ___.
examples: I felt a real sense of accomplishment after finishing the 10k run.
I felt a real sense of accomplishment after finally submitting my thesis.
variations: I felt proud of myself for ___
It was so rewarding to ___
I gave myself a pat on the back for ___

expressions.en_pattern: All my consistent effort on ___ finally paid off.
examples: All my consistent effort on learning English finally paid off when I held a full conversation with a foreigner.
All my consistent effort on saving money finally paid off when I booked my dream trip.
variations: My hard work on ___ paid off
The grind on ___ was worth it

expressions.en_pattern: Even something small like ___ made me feel proud today.
examples: Even something small like making my bed in the morning made me feel proud today.
Even something small like going for a 20-minute walk made me feel proud today.
variations: I'm proud of myself for the little win of ___
Small wins like ___ matter

expressions.en_pattern: The old me would never have ___, but today I did.
examples: The old me would never have spoken up in a meeting like that, but today I did.
The old me would never have gone to an event alone, but today I did and actually enjoyed it.
variations: A year ago I couldn't have ___, but now I can
I surprised myself by ___ing

expressions.en_pattern: I wish I had ___.
examples: I wish I had spoken up during the meeting instead of staying silent.
I wish I had gone to bed earlier last night — I was exhausted all day.
variations: If only I had ___
I regret not ___ing

expressions.en_pattern: I don't know why I did that — I'm kind of ashamed of myself.
examples: I don't know why I lost my temper with her — I'm kind of ashamed of myself.
I don't know why I procrastinated all weekend — I'm kind of ashamed of myself.
variations: I beat myself up over ___
I keep replaying ___ in my head

expressions.en_pattern: I shouldn't have ___.
examples: I shouldn't have said that to my mom; I could see it hurt her.
I shouldn't have eaten so much late at night — now I feel awful.
variations: I regret ___ing
It was a mistake to ___

expressions.en_pattern: Things might have turned out differently if I had ___.
examples: Things might have turned out differently if I had been more honest from the start.
Things might have turned out differently if I had reached out to him before it was too late.
variations: I keep wondering what would have happened if ___
I can't help second-guessing my choice to ___

expressions.en_pattern: I'm so relieved that ___.
examples: I'm so relieved that the test results came back normal.
I'm so relieved that I made it to the airport just in time.
variations: Thank goodness ___
What a relief that ___
I can finally breathe easy now that ___

expressions.en_pattern: It had been a while since ___, and it felt so calming.
examples: It had been a while since I read a book by the window, and it felt so calming.
It had been a while since I called my mom for no reason, and it felt so calming.
variations: ___ was just what I needed
I felt at peace while ___ing

expressions.en_pattern: It feels like a weight has been lifted off my shoulders.
examples: It feels like a weight has been lifted off my shoulders now that the project is finally over.
It feels like a weight has been lifted off my shoulders after I finally told him how I felt.
variations: I feel so much lighter now that ___
A huge burden is finally gone

expressions.en_pattern: It turned out to be less of a big deal than I feared, which was a relief.
examples: It turned out to be less of a big deal than I feared, which was a relief — the dentist said the cavity was minor.
It turned out to be less of a big deal than I feared, which was a relief; my boss barely mentioned the mistake.
variations: I worked myself up over nothing
All that worrying was for nothing

expressions.en_pattern: I had so much fun ___ing.
examples: I had so much fun catching up with old friends over dinner.
I had so much fun playing board games with my family last night.
variations: I really enjoyed ___ing
It was such a blast ___ing

expressions.en_pattern: I haven't laughed this much in ages.
examples: I haven't laughed this much in ages — my coworker's stories had me in tears.
I haven't laughed this much in ages, and my cheeks actually hurt by the end of the night.
variations: My face hurt from smiling
I couldn't stop laughing during ___

expressions.en_pattern: Something small like ___ made my whole day.
examples: Something small like a barista drawing a heart on my latte made my whole day.
Something small like finding cash in an old jacket made my whole day.
variations: ___ put a smile on my face
It's the little things — like ___

expressions.ko_pattern: 오늘 같은 날은 두고두고 기억하고 싶어
expressions.en_pattern: Today was one of those days I want to tuck away and remember.
examples: Today was one of those days I want to tuck away and remember — sunny, slow, and full of laughter.
Today was one of those days I want to tuck away and remember; nothing big happened, but everything felt right.
variations: I want to bottle this feeling
Today felt like a memory I'll come back to

expressions.en_pattern: I'm so excited about ___.
examples: I'm so excited about the trip next weekend — I've been counting down the days.
I'm so excited about my new job; I keep imagining what my first day will be like.
variations: I can't wait for ___
I'm pumped about ___

expressions.en_pattern: I'm too excited to sleep — ___.
examples: I'm too excited to sleep — tomorrow is my first solo trip abroad.
I'm too excited to sleep — the concert tickets I've waited months for finally arrived.
variations: My heart is racing thinking about ___
I keep tossing and turning over ___

expressions.en_pattern: Just thinking about ___ gives me butterflies.
examples: Just thinking about seeing him again gives me butterflies.
Just thinking about moving into my new apartment gives me butterflies.
variations: I get goosebumps every time I think about ___
My stomach flips when I imagine ___

expressions.ko_pattern: 마음이 들떠서 일이 손에 안 잡혀
expressions.en_pattern: I was so worked up about ___ that I couldn't focus on anything else.
examples: I was so worked up about the audition results that I couldn't focus on anything else all afternoon.
I was so worked up about meeting my favorite author that I couldn't focus on anything else at work.
variations: My head was somewhere else all day
I was practically vibrating with excitement

expressions.en_pattern: Today was one of those happy days.
examples: Today was one of those happy days where everything just seemed to go right.
Today was one of those happy days I'll think about whenever I need cheering up.
variations: Today was a really good day
I'm feeling grateful for today

expressions.en_pattern: I feel happiest when I'm with ___.
examples: I feel happiest when I'm with my closest friends, just doing nothing in particular.
I feel happiest when I'm with my dog on a long Sunday walk.
variations: Nothing makes me happier than ___
My happy place is ___

expressions.en_pattern: ___ warmed my heart today.
examples: My grandma's handwritten letter warmed my heart today.
Watching the kids laugh in the park warmed my heart today.
variations: It melted my heart when ___
My heart felt full when ___

expressions.ko_pattern: 이런 평범한 순간이 진짜 행복이라는 걸 느꼈어
expressions.en_pattern: I realized today that real happiness lives in moments like ___.
examples: I realized today that real happiness lives in moments like sharing a quiet coffee with my partner.
I realized today that real happiness lives in moments like cooking dinner with music on.
variations: Happiness, I'm learning, is made of small things — like ___
Contentment crept up on me while ___ing

expressions.en_pattern: I just feel down today for no clear reason.
examples: I just feel down today for no clear reason — even my favorite music didn't help.
I just feel down today for no clear reason; I'd rather not talk to anyone.
variations: I'm in a bit of a funk today
I'm not feeling like myself

expressions.en_pattern: ___ has been weighing on me.
examples: That conversation with my dad has been weighing on me all week.
The thought of moving away has been weighing on me more than I expected.
variations: I can't shake the feeling of ___
___ has been heavy on my mind

expressions.en_pattern: I had no motivation to do anything today.
examples: I had no motivation to do anything today — I just lay in bed scrolling for hours.
I had no motivation to do anything today, not even the things I usually love.
variations: I felt completely drained
Even getting out of bed felt like too much

expressions.en_pattern: I kept up appearances all day, but I wasn't really okay.
examples: I kept up appearances all day, but I wasn't really okay — I cried as soon as I got home.
I kept up appearances all day, but I wasn't really okay; smiling took everything I had.
variations: I was holding it together on the outside
I put on a brave face, but inside ___

expressions.en_pattern: I'm so grateful to ___ today.
examples: I'm so grateful to my roommate today — she cooked dinner when I was too tired to move.
I'm so grateful to my mentor today; her advice changed how I see the whole project.
variations: Thank goodness for ___
I owe ___ one

expressions.ko_pattern: 당연한 게 아니라는 걸 새삼 느꼈어
expressions.en_pattern: I was reminded today not to take ___ for granted.
examples: I was reminded today not to take my health for granted after hearing about a friend's diagnosis.
I was reminded today not to take my parents for granted; they won't be around forever.
variations: I don't say it enough, but I'm thankful for ___
I needed the reminder that ___ is a gift

expressions.en_pattern: A small kindness from ___ meant a lot to me today.
examples: A small kindness from a stranger holding the door meant a lot to me today.
A small kindness from my coworker bringing me coffee meant a lot to me today.
variations: ___'s little gesture really brightened my day
It was such a thoughtful thing for ___ to do

expressions.ko_pattern: 이 모든 게 얼마나 감사한 일인지 새삼 깨달았어
expressions.en_pattern: It hit me today how lucky I am to have ___.
examples: It hit me today how lucky I am to have people who check in on me without being asked.
It hit me today how lucky I am to have a job that lets me come home and rest.
variations: I count myself fortunate for ___
I sometimes forget how blessed I am to ___

expressions.en_pattern: I feel so bad about ___.
examples: I feel so bad about snapping at my sister this morning over something small.
I feel so bad about forgetting our anniversary; I want to make it up to her.
variations: I owe ___ an apology
I keep thinking about how I let ___ down

expressions.en_pattern: It's been bothering me that I ___.
examples: It's been bothering me that I didn't reply to her message until two days later.
It's been bothering me that I left the meeting without thanking the team.
variations: I can't stop thinking about how I ___
I feel guilty for ___ing

expressions.en_pattern: I don't even know how to begin to apologize for ___.
examples: I don't even know how to begin to apologize for what I said in anger last night.
I don't even know how to begin to apologize for missing such an important day for him.
variations: A simple 'sorry' doesn't feel like enough for ___
I'm not sure any words will make up for ___

expressions.ko_pattern: 내 행동이 ~에게 상처가 됐다는 걸 깨달았어
expressions.en_pattern: I realized too late that my behavior had hurt ___.
examples: I realized too late that my behavior had hurt my closest friend, and I'm still working out how to make it right.
I realized too late that my behavior had hurt my parents more than they let on.
variations: It dawned on me that ___ had been hurt by what I did
I didn't see the damage I'd done to ___ until now

expressions.en_pattern: ___ really annoyed me today.
examples: The slow Wi-Fi at the café really annoyed me today.
My coworker interrupting me every five minutes really annoyed me today.
variations: ___ got on my nerves
I was so irritated by ___

expressions.en_pattern: It's a small thing, but ___ keeps bugging me.
examples: It's a small thing, but the way she said it keeps bugging me.
It's a small thing, but the unanswered text keeps bugging me all day.
variations: I can't let go of ___
___ shouldn't bother me this much, but it does

expressions.en_pattern: Everything is rubbing me the wrong way today.
examples: Everything is rubbing me the wrong way today — even the sound of my own typing.
Everything is rubbing me the wrong way today; I think I just need to be alone for a while.
variations: I'm short on patience today
I woke up on the wrong side of the bed

expressions.en_pattern: I held it in for so long that I almost snapped at ___.
examples: I held it in for so long that I almost snapped at my coworker over a tiny request.
I held it in for so long that I almost snapped at the customer service rep on the phone.
variations: My patience was wearing dangerously thin
I came close to losing it over ___

expressions.en_pattern: I'm really angry about ___.
examples: I'm really angry about the way I was talked down to in the meeting.
I'm really angry about how unfair the decision was.
variations: ___ made my blood boil
I'm furious that ___

expressions.ko_pattern: 그 말을 듣고 너무 어이없어서 화가 났어
expressions.en_pattern: I was so taken aback that I got angry when ___.
examples: I was so taken aback that I got angry when he said it was 'just a joke'.
I was so taken aback that I got angry when she blamed me for something I didn't do.
variations: I saw red when ___
Something in me snapped when ___

expressions.en_pattern: I had to take a step back and cool down before I said something I'd regret.
examples: I had to take a step back and cool down before I said something I'd regret to my manager.
I had to take a step back and cool down before I said something I'd regret in the group chat.
variations: I bit my tongue to keep from blowing up
I walked away to avoid making it worse

expressions.ko_pattern: 화가 가라앉질 않아 계속 곱씹게 돼
expressions.en_pattern: I can't stop replaying what happened in my head, and the anger keeps simmering.
examples: I can't stop replaying what happened in my head, and the anger keeps simmering even hours later.
I can't stop replaying what happened in my head, and the anger keeps simmering every time I think of his face.
variations: The more I think about it, the angrier I get
It's eating away at me — what they did

expressions.en_pattern: I'm a little jealous of ___.
examples: I'm a little jealous of my friend's new apartment with the huge windows.
I'm a little jealous of how my cousin always seems so confident.
variations: I envy ___
I wish I had ___ like ___ does

expressions.ko_pattern: 비교하지 말아야지 하면서도 자꾸 비교하게 돼
expressions.en_pattern: I keep comparing myself to ___ even though I know I shouldn't.
examples: I keep comparing myself to my classmates on LinkedIn even though I know I shouldn't.
I keep comparing myself to my sister's career even though I know I shouldn't.
variations: Comparison really is the thief of joy
Scrolling social media made me feel small

expressions.en_pattern: I was happy for ___, but a small part of me felt bitter.
examples: I was happy for her promotion, but a small part of me felt bitter that I had been passed over.
I was happy for him, but a small part of me felt bitter that things came so easily to him.
variations: I clapped on the outside but ached on the inside
Mixed feelings — I was glad for ___, but also envious

expressions.ko_pattern: 그들이 가진 ~을 보면서 내 부족함이 더 크게 느껴졌어
expressions.en_pattern: Seeing what ___ has only made me more aware of what I'm lacking.
examples: Seeing what they've built together only made me more aware of what I'm lacking in my own relationships.
Seeing what my peers have achieved only made me more aware of what I'm lacking in my career.
variations: Their success holds a mirror up to my own gaps
I left feeling smaller than when I arrived

expressions.en_pattern: I felt a little lonely today.
examples: I felt a little lonely today, even though I had things to do.
I felt a little lonely today walking home after work.
variations: I missed having someone around
It was one of those quiet, lonely days

expressions.ko_pattern: 사람들 사이에 있어도 혼자인 것 같았어
expressions.en_pattern: I felt alone even in a room full of people.
examples: I felt alone even in a room full of people at the party last night.
I felt alone even in a room full of people during the team lunch.
variations: I was surrounded but disconnected
The crowd somehow made it worse

expressions.ko_pattern: 이런 기분을 나눌 사람이 없는 게 더 외로워
expressions.en_pattern: What makes it lonelier is having no one to share this feeling with.
examples: What makes it lonelier is having no one to share this feeling with after a long day.
What makes it lonelier is having no one to share this feeling with when I get good news, too.
variations: I wish I had someone I could just call
The silence in my apartment felt louder than usual

expressions.ko_pattern: 익숙해질 줄 알았던 외로움이 오늘은 유난히 무거웠어
expressions.en_pattern: The loneliness I thought I'd gotten used to felt heavier than usual today.
examples: The loneliness I thought I'd gotten used to felt heavier than usual today — maybe it was the rain.
The loneliness I thought I'd gotten used to felt heavier than usual today after seeing everyone post about their weekends.
variations: The hollow feeling crept back in
Some days the quiet is comforting; today it wasn't

diary_samples.title: A long Monday
diary_samples.mood_summary: 월요일 발표 후의 후회와 안도가 뒤섞인 하루

sentences.ko: 월요일 아침부터 발표가 잡혀 있어서 너무 떨렸어.
sentences.en: I was so nervous because the presentation was scheduled for Monday morning.

sentences.ko: 발표 도중 한 부분에서 머릿속이 하얘져서 당황했어.
sentences.en: I was at a loss for words when my mind suddenly went blank in the middle of the presentation.

sentences.ko: 조용히 넘어가긴 했지만, 더 잘했을 수 있었는데 하는 아쉬움이 남았어.
sentences.en: I wish I had prepared a bit more for the Q&A part instead of rushing through it.

sentences.ko: 그래도 끝났다는 게 마치 어깨에서 짐을 내려놓은 기분이었어.
sentences.en: Still, it feels like a weight has been lifted off my shoulders now that it's finally over.

sentences.ko: 팀장님이 작은 부분을 칭찬해주신 게 의외로 큰 위로가 됐어.
sentences.en: A small kindness from my manager, who praised one detail, meant a lot to me today.

sentences.ko: 오늘 같은 날은 일찍 자는 게 나 자신에게 주는 선물 같아.
sentences.en: Going to bed early on a day like today feels like a little gift to myself.

diary_samples.title: Scrolling at midnight
diary_samples.mood_summary: SNS 스크롤 중 마음이 복잡해진 늦은 밤

sentences.ko: 잠이 안 와서 인스타를 한 시간 넘게 스크롤했어.
sentences.en: I couldn't sleep, so I ended up scrolling Instagram for over an hour.

sentences.ko: 친구가 새로 이사 간 집 사진을 보니 부럽기도 하고 묘하게 씁쓸했어.
sentences.en: I was happy for my friend's new place, but a small part of me felt bitter that I'm still in the same apartment.

sentences.ko: 비교하지 말아야지 하면서도 자꾸 비교하게 되더라.
sentences.en: I keep comparing myself to people online even though I know I shouldn't.

sentences.ko: 이런 기분을 솔직히 털어놓을 사람이 없다는 게 외로웠어.
sentences.en: What makes it lonelier is having no one to share this feeling with at this hour.

sentences.ko: 그래도 내가 이런 감정을 글로 쓰고 있다는 자체가 작은 발전 같아서 뿌듯해.
sentences.en: Even something small like writing this down honestly made me feel proud of myself tonight.

diary_samples.title: An unexpected good day
diary_samples.mood_summary: 기대 없던 토요일이 의외로 따뜻했던 하루

sentences.en: I had planned to stay in all day and do nothing in particular.

sentences.ko: 엄마가 갑자기 점심 먹으러 오라는 전화를 해서 좀 당황했어.
sentences.en: I was caught off guard when my mom called and told me to come over for lunch.

sentences.ko: 오랜만에 가족과 둘러앉아 밥 먹는 게 생각보다 좋았어.
sentences.en: It had been a while since I sat down with my family like that, and it felt so calming.

sentences.ko: 엄마가 끓여준 된장국을 보니 마음이 따뜻해졌어.
sentences.en: Mom's homemade soup warmed my heart today in a way I didn't expect.

sentences.ko: 당연하게 여겼던 이 시간이 사실 얼마나 감사한 일인지 새삼 깨달았어.
sentences.en: I was reminded today not to take ordinary afternoons with family for granted.

sentences.ko: 오늘 같은 날은 두고두고 기억하고 싶어.
sentences.en: Today was one of those days I want to tuck away and remember.
